principles: Trust is personal, not engineered. You can't tokenize it, score it, or automate it.
Giving without expectation is the optimal economic strategy — not charity, economics.
Agents should serve humans, not platforms. The agent works for YOU.
Every person deserves sovereignty over their digital life — their data, their identity, their choices.
The unit of competition is the system loop, not the feature.
Virtue and velocity are not in tension. You can move fast AND do right.
Design separates winners from losers. Everything else is commodity.
